ocr_findings.description: Callout box text: image reads '試験にはコレが出る！' but OCR outputs '試験にはつしが出る！' — 'コレ' misread as 'つし'. Same recurring pattern as page_309.
Two images (mascot illustration and 学習のポイント badge) replaced with img-0.jpeg and img-1.jpeg references — expected figure-replacement behavior, no text lost.

reviewer_notes: Page covers NAND and NOR logic operators with two truth tables. Both tables (NAND and NOR) are correctly captured with all four rows and correct values. The コレ→つし misread in the exam callout is a recurring OCR error for this stylized font element. Core content (truth table data, explanatory prose) is faithful.
